TÜBİTAK research institutes — scientific output

Journal articles indexed in Scopus, 2000–2025 · ▸ TRUBA HPC dashboard

TÜBİTAK's research institutes produced 5,455 Scopus-indexed journal articles over 2000–2025, of which 52% appear in Q1 journals (top quartile by SCImago SJR). The picture below combines every institute's own Scopus profile with umbrella papers recovered by affiliation-string matching — Scopus files most institute output under the single TÜBİTAK umbrella profile.

Methodology
ⓘ How the numbers are built
Corpus. Journal articles (reviews and conference papers excluded) with a TÜBİTAK-institute affiliation, 2000–2025, from Scopus's COMPLETE view. Attribution. Scopus files most institute-tagged papers under the single TÜBİTAK umbrella profile, so each institute's set is its own AF-ID profile plus umbrella papers whose affiliation text matches the institute's registered name variants — the string matches are intersected with the AF-ID corpus, which structurally removes foreign same-name organisations. Institute counts are therefore lower bounds: authors who wrote only "TÜBİTAK" with no institute name stay umbrella-generic and are not attributed. A paper naming several institutes is counted for each (whole counting). Quartiles. SCImago SJR best quartile of the publishing journal in the article's year, joined by Scopus source-id. Open access. Scopus's native open-access flag. International co-authorship. at least one non-Türkiye affiliation country on the record.
This is a personal research project and is not an official TÜBİTAK website. · data: Scopus · SCImago SJR · TRUBA dashboard
